summary: Completed comprehensive testing of .data file import feature (LunchPad format). All 11 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend tests confirm 'Импорт меню' button visible, file input accepts both .data and .json files, and imported categories from LunchPad format are correctly displayed.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-file without auth returns 401
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-file rejects .txt files (returns 400)
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-file rejects .csv files (returns 400)
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-file rejects .xml files (returns 400)
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-file accepts .data files
Backend: POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-file accepts .json files

Backend: HTML tags stripped from imported category names (

tags removed)
Backend: HTML tags stripped from imported item descriptions (<span>, <b> tags removed)
Backend: Prices parsed correctly - string price '15.5' -> float 15.5
Backend: Prices parsed correctly - number price 25 -> float 25
Backend: Prices parsed correctly - null price -> float 0
Backend: Weight parsed from prices[0].measure field
Backend: Image URL imported from foto.image_url field
Backend: Display mode mapping - grid -> card
Backend: Display mode mapping - list -> compact
Backend: Display mode mapping - empty -> compact
Backend: in_stop_list=false -> is_available=true
Backend: in_stop_list=true -> is_available=false
Backend: Real sample /tmp/menu_sample.data file imports successfully
Frontend: 'Импорт меню' button visible in menu page header (not 'Импорт JSON')
Frontend: File input accept attribute includes both .json and .data
Frontend: Import button click triggers file chooser dialog
Frontend: LunchPad categories visible - Завтраки до 16.00
Frontend: LunchPad categories visible - Суши
Frontend: LunchPad categories visible - Салаты
Frontend: LunchPad categories visible - Закуски
Frontend: LunchPad categories visible - Плато
Frontend: LunchPad categories visible - Сезонное меню
seed_data_creation: Test categories with TEST_ prefix were created during testing and cleaned up automatically. Real LunchPad data from /tmp/menu_sample.data was previously imported to Мята Спортивная restaurant.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The .data file import feature (LunchPad format) is fully implemented and working. Endpoint POST /api/restaurants/{id}/import-file accepts both .data and .json files. LunchPad format parser (parse_lunchpad_data) handles: type=0 for categories, type=4 for items, strips HTML from names/descriptions, maps prices[0].price/measure, foto.image_url, in_stop_list->is_available (inverted), display grid->card / list->compact. Frontend button shows 'Импорт меню' with FileJson icon, file input accepts '.json,.data'. Total 52 categories in Мята Спортивная restaurant including imported LunchPad data.

lunchpad_parsing.item_detection: type=4 entries parsed as menu items
